description: ApplicationSetApplicationStatus contains details about each Application managed by the ApplicationSet

application.description: Application contains the name of the Application resource

lastTransitionTime.description: LastTransitionTime is the time the status was last updated

message.description: Message contains human-readable message indicating details about the status

status.description: Status contains the AppSet's perceived status of the managed Application resource

step.description: Step tracks which step this Application should be updated in

targetRevisions.description: TargetRevision tracks the desired revisions the Application should be synced to.
